en: Now the point in what we are saying is this: we have such a high priest, one who is seated at the right hand of the throne of the Majesty in heaven,
zh: 我們所講論的重點，就是我們有這樣的一位大祭司，他已經坐在眾天之上至尊者的寶座右邊，

en: a minister in the holy places, in the true tent that the Lord set up, not man.
zh: 在至聖所和真會幕裡供職；這真會幕是主支搭的，不是人支搭的。

en: For every high priest is appointed to offer gifts and sacrifices; thus it is necessary for this priest also to have something to offer.
zh: 所有大祭司都是為了獻禮物和祭品而設立的，所以這位大祭司，也必須有所獻上的。

en: Now if he were on earth, he would not be a priest at all, since there are priests who offer gifts according to the law.
zh: 如果他在地上，就不會作祭司，因為已經有按照律法獻禮物的祭司了。

en: They serve a copy and shadow of the heavenly things. For when Moses was about to erect the tent, he was instructed by God, saying, "See that you make everything according to the pattern that was shown you on the mountain."
zh: 這些祭司所供奉的職事，不過是天上的事物的副本和影像，就如摩西將要造會幕的時候， 神曾經警告他說：“你要留心，各樣物件，都要照著在山上指示你的樣式去作。”

en: But as it is, Christ has obtained a ministry that is as much more excellent than the old as the covenant he mediates is better, since it is enacted on better promises.
zh: 但是現在耶穌得了更尊貴的職分，正好像他是更美的約的中保，這約是憑著更美的應許立的。

en: For if that first covenant had been faultless, there would have been no occasion to look for a second.
zh: 如果頭一個約沒有缺點，就沒有尋求另一個約的必要了。

en: For he finds fault with them when he says: "Behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when I will establish a new covenant with the house of Israel and with the house of Judah,
zh: 可是 神指責他們，說： “看哪，主說，日子要到了， 我要與以色列家 和猶大家訂立新約。

en: not like the covenant that I made with their fathers on the day when I took them by the hand to bring them out of the land of Egypt. For they did not continue in my covenant, and so I showed no concern for them, declares the Lord.
zh: 這新約不像從前我拉他們祖先的手， 領他們出埃及的日子與他們所立的約。 因為他們沒有遵守我的約， 我就不理會他們。這是主說的。

en: For this is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, declares the Lord: I will put my laws into their minds, and write them on their hearts, and I will be their God, and they shall be my people.
zh: 主說：‘因為在那些日子以後， 我要與以色列家所立的約是這樣： 我要把我的律法放在他們的心思裡面， 寫在他們的心上。 我要作他們的 神， 他們要作我的子民。

en: And they shall not teach, each one his neighbor and each one his brother, saying, 'Know the Lord,' for they shall all know me, from the least of them to the greatest.
zh: 他們各人必不用教導自己的鄰居， 和自己的同胞，說： 你要認識主。 因為所有的人，從最小到最大的， 都必認識我。

en: For I will be merciful toward their iniquities, and I will remember their sins no more."
zh: 我也要寬恕他們的不義， 決不再記著他們的罪惡。’”

en: In speaking of a new covenant, he makes the first one obsolete. And what is becoming obsolete and growing old is ready to vanish away.
zh: 神既然說到新的約，就是把前約當作舊的了；那變成陳舊衰老的，就快要消逝了。
